sections.paragraph: (“dwelling in a clayey soil”), a Girgashite, collect. Girgashites, a Canaanitish people, whose location does not appear from the Old Test. Gen 10:16 15:21 Jos 24:11. LXX. with Josephus, Ant. i. 6, § 2 , Γεργεσαῖος. Euseb. in Onom. under the word Γεργασεί, says that they dwelt beyond Jordan.
